step_rationale: Lymphocyte antigen 96; co-receptor for TLR4 and TLR2, essential for lipopolysaccharide and pathogen sensing.
mechanism: LY96 amplifies TLR-mediated monocyte and endothelial activation, intensifying plaque inflammation and atherothrombotic susceptibility.

references.title: Identification of core genes shared by ischemic stroke and myocardial infarction using an integrated approach.
